title.en: In an instant, three general-level beings attac...

content.en:
"Do it!"

White Fang and they know that the Monkey has already made a move, that the king has been trapped, and they can break through here and rob Nome of Gold Ore.

In an instant, three general-level beings attacked here.

Thundered!!!!

The terrifying attack tore through the void here, making those soldier-level miners panic, hiding in the mine one by one, not daring to come out at all.

The Nome ore vein is still very hard, even the general level can't break this ore vein, hiding in the depths of the mine, as long as the luck is not bad, it is still not easy to be affected.

Now.

Ye Tian had already sensed the existence of the three general-level beings in the outside world, and at the same time, he had also received a summons from Elder Tuo and knew that the You Clan had invaded the Nome Ore Vein.

"These wanderers are really looking for death!"

Ye Tian was a little annoyed, he cultivated well, these wanderers had to come to disturb him.

Swish!

He shuttled out directly, and in an instant, he intercepted the three general-level beings who had just broken through a formation.

"Hahaha, a newly promoted general dares to come out!"

White Fang sneered, and then they were ready to join forces to instantly kill the new general-level genius of the Eagle Department.

"Kill!"

They all performed their ultimate killing moves, and the three major killing moves enveloped Ye Tian, wanting to smash Ye Tian's body.

In an instant, the Ultimate Void shattered.

They thought that Ye Tian was dead, but they found that Ye Tian had come out of the shattered ultimate void without any injuries.

"How so?"

The strength of the three of them is not weak, and when they join forces, even if the top generals resist their attacks, it is impossible to be unharmed.

But Ye Tian was unscathed.

Then.

They suddenly discovered that Ye Tian's body was permeated with the power of an ultimate rule.

"He's got the ultimate rule!"

"Run!"

White Fang shouted.

The ultimate rule, if the existence of the ultimate level comprehends the ultimate rule, it will inevitably be able to break through to the king level.

Although it is not difficult to comprehend the ultimate rules, it is really difficult for generals with average talent.

Not long after Ye Tian broke through the general rank, he comprehended the ultimate rule, which shocked them.

Although they can't recognize what the ultimate rule is that Ye Tian comprehends, it's not something they can compete with!

A general who comprehends the ultimate rule is the invincible among the generals!

Whew!!!

They moved quickly, wanting to escape, but Ye Tian only flicked his fingers, and three rays of light instantly penetrated the three general-level existences, killing them in an instant.

"It's too weak!"

Ye Tian sneered.

Even the three weak generals dared to attack him here.

"The Guardian makes the Lord invincible!" said Saya as she ran out.

"I'll go somewhere else to help. "

Ye Tian didn't really want to support, but he showed his strength, and Saya and the other miners would definitely know that if the patriarch or Elder Tuo knew that he had a very strong strength but didn't support it, it was estimated that there would be gossip, and he would not be able to practice quietly.

Therefore, the support still has to be supported.

Swish!

Ye Tian cast his thoughts and went to other areas.

In an instant, he came to another area, and made an instant move, killing the two generals, and then went to support.

After a while, many general-level existences were killed by Ye Tian.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to Elder Tuo, and the copying talent shrouded all around, and he immediately discovered a top-level general-level existence-Monkey.

"Who is this guy?"

The monkey was stunned, Ye Tian arrived here in an instant, the speed was too fast, he didn't react at all.

Immediately after, he saw Ye Tian's aura lock on him.

"Run!"

Although he didn't fight Ye Tian, he felt that the ultimate particles in his whole body were trembling, and he didn't dare to compete with Ye Tian at all!

However, he had the idea of fleeing, and an attack had already penetrated his body.

For the first time, he used one treasure to protect his life, and then used another treasure to try to penetrate the void.

At this time, a big hand directly broke through the air and grabbed him out, and then directly pinched him to death.

"A general-level existence comparable to a king!"

The monkey regretted it, he knew that there was such a demonic general here, he shouldn't have come here!

After killing the monkey, Ye Tian took action to help Elder Tuo deal with this Dark Liquid, and after his assistance, this Dark Liquid was gradually sealed into a drop.

"God, your strength is so powerful!"

Elder Tuo was a little surprised.

Subsequently, he inquired about the situation in other places, and was relieved to learn that Ye Tian had already killed the other generals, and the crisis had been resolved.

At the same time, Ye Tian made great contributions and also received a large number of Nome Gold rewards.

......

Eagle Ministry.

Patriarch Heying was shocked when he learned that Ye Tian had a combat power no less than that of a king.

"It's not long since this little guy broke through the king level, and he has mastered the ultimate rules and a variety of ultimate arcane arts, this comprehension qualification is too rebellious!"

Tsurukage was very excited.

Perhaps, Ye Tian has the hope of breaking through to become an ancient demon-level existence, and once the Eagle Department gives birth to an ancient demon-level existence, it will also be a big tribe in the Abyss of Aromu, although it is not as good as a tribe like the Golden God Ministry, but at least it will develop rapidly, which is enough for the group to give birth to many emperor-level existences.

It can be said that the rise of the Eagle Department depends on Ye Tian.

Therefore, he blocked the news as soon as possible, so that Ye Tian's strength would not be exposed, otherwise he would be known by the hostile forces, and he might assassinate Ye Tian in advance.

Therefore, Ye Tian's strength must be blocked and not allowed to be known to outsiders.

......

After these wanderers attacked the Nome ore vein, the following period of time was very peaceful, and Ye Tian obtained the supply of many resources in the clan, and his body refining soared, and his strength increased rapidly.

Gradually, Ye Tian's physical strength was at the middle level among the generals.

this day.

The patriarch Crane Shadow recalled Ye Tian, and Ye Tian returned to the clan from the Nome ore vein for the first time and met the Crane Shadow Patriarch.

"Patriarch!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"God, you sit!"

Crane Shadow was very polite to Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian's strength was already comparable to the king level, equivalent to an elder, and he would definitely be able to surpass him in the future.

Therefore, he naturally has the respect he deserves for Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian sat down, he asked, "Patriarch, do you have any instructions for calling me back this time?"

Crane Shadow introduced: "This time is a good thing, there is an ancient demon-level ruin about to be born, and all under the emperor level are allowed to enter, our Eagle Department has three places, and I am ready to give you one of the places." With your natural aptitude, you may be able to gain more benefits than other elders. "。
